programme.title: Project Runway: Avsnitt 1913
programme.desc: Designerna tävlar om platserna i finalen av säsong 19. I den sista utmaningen måste de visa domarna sitt varumärke och sin vision för framtidens mode i en enda look.

programme.title: Project Runway: Avsnitt 1914
programme.desc: De fyra sista designerna förbereder sig för en show på New York Fashion Week och en vinnare för säsong 19 utses. Del 1 av 2.

programme.title: Project Runway: Avsnitt 1915
programme.desc: De fyra sista designerna förbereder sig för en show på New York Fashion Week och en vinnare för säsong 19 utses. Del 2 av 2.

programme.title: Project Runway: Avsnitt 1601
programme.desc: Tim Gunn presenterar säsong 16´s 16 nya designers. Vi får också se material från deras auditions.

programme.title: Project Runway: Avsnitt 1602
programme.desc: Alla designers måste skapa en kreation för röda mattan som visar deras stil. Deltagarna får också reda på att de ska jobba med modeller i alla storlekar.

programme.title: Project Runway: Avsnitt 1603
programme.desc: Deltagarna kämpar med få sina röster hörda i deras första grupputmaning. En uppgift blir att designa något av återvunnet material.

programme.title: Project Runway: Avsnitt 1604
programme.desc: Deltagrna får en privatvisning av filmen "Leap!" och ett uppträdande av Hiplet och sedan göra en kreation inspirerad av detta.

programme.title: Project Runway: Avsnitt 1605
programme.desc: Deltagarna tävlar i Heidi Klums sovplaggsutmaning och har ett pyjamasparty på toppen av Empire State Building.

programme.title: Project Runway: Avsnitt 1606
programme.desc: Med inspriation från filmen Descendants 2 besöker deltagarna Lyndhurst Castle där de ska skapa en look som ska representera "ond" eller "god".

programme.title: American Pickers: Avsnitt 703
programme.desc: Danielle och pojkarna lägger i hög växel när de lyckas lägga vantarna på ett superköp för Dollywood och en hyllning till brandpatrullen i Smoky Mountains från 1930-talet.

programme.title: American Pickers: Avsnitt 704
programme.desc: Frank och Daves bilresa genom Florida blir allt konstigare, från en läskig samling kitsch till en bogserbåt som är hemvist för en kapten och hans ovanliga husdjur.

programme.title: American Pickers: Avsnitt 705
programme.desc: En relik från ett legendariskt plantagehus, en bilaffär med klassiska bilar och killarna kollar in en freestyle-butik.

programme.title: American Pickers: Avsnitt 706
programme.desc: Killarna kollar in en retrobil-affär som ägs av en äkta racingfamilj. De hamnar i en återvändsgränd när de förhandlar med länets tidigare polischef.

programme.title: American Pickers: Avsnitt 707
programme.desc: En samlare med en ovanlig smak för högspänningsobjekt avslöjar sitt chockerande förråd, och Mike och Frank drabbas av otur när bröderna Willett försöker hindra dem.

programme.title: American Pickers: Avsnitt 708
programme.desc: Den excentriske prins Mongo lyder under en utomvärldslig makt och beordrar Mike och Frank att köpa, men vägrar att ge dem några priser.

programme.title: American Pickers: Avsnitt 709
programme.desc: Frank och Mike utforskar Tims stora samlingar i West Virginia. Sedan åker de till Robert som har en gammal byggnad fylld med generationer av saker som nu håller på att rasa.

programme.title: American Pickers: Avsnitt 710
programme.desc: I ett fantastiskt garage i Kalifornien hittar Mike en retrobåt som han bara måste äga och faller sedan för en BMW-mikrobil som kan vara värd mycket.

programme.title: Bellator 257: Nemkov vs. Davis 2: Bellator 257: Nemkov vs. Davis 2
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to the Mohegan Sun Arena as newly crowned Bellator MMA Light Heavyweight World Champion Vadim Nemkov puts his belt on the line against Phil 'Mr. Wonderful' Davis in a highly anticipated rematch.

programme.title: My Family and The Galapagos: Episode 1
programme.desc: Monty Halls and family return to the Galapagos to aid a Giant Tortoise study and Tam goes in search of Giant Manta Rays.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul
programme.desc: From assassins who plot to poison a Sultan to bitter enemies who sign the world’s first peace treaty, discover the secrets inside the Topkapi Palace Museum.
programme.sub-title: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul

programme.title: War Crimes of the Liberators: War Crimes of the Liberators
programme.desc: "War Crimes of the Liberators" follows the deficiencies of discipline and military justice in the US Army using unpublished documents and moving statements.

programme.title: Return of the Bible Plagues: Sandstorm
programme.desc: Dust storms frequently paralyze public life during the storm season in many of the most arid regions of the Earth, burying roads and human settlements.

programme.title: Hitler's People: Conformity
programme.desc: Nazi Germany 10 years before the 1944 assassination attempt: it’s the era just after the seizure of power, when enforced conformity becomes part of all aspects of life.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Museum of Anthropology, Mexico City
programme.desc: From ancient athletes who kick a severed head to a peasant dress that brings down an empire, discover the secrets inside the National Museum of Anthropology.
programme.sub-title: Inside the National Museum of Anthropology, Mexico City

programme.title: Ocean Stories: The Giant and the Phantom
programme.desc: Wildlife film-maker Thomas Behrend tracks down the biggest and the rarest predators of the Mediterranean: sperm whales and monk seals.

programme.title: My Family and The Galapagos: Episode 3
programme.desc: Biologist broadcaster and conservationist Monty Halls and his family go to the Galapagos Islands, where for the next three months they will experience an utterly unique way of life.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Duck, Duck... Pork!
programme.desc: $50,000 and the coveted title of Kingsford BBQ Pitmasters All-Star Grand Champion are on the line. The first round battles are over and six pitmasters are still in the running for BBQ's ultimate prize.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Fowl Play
programme.desc: $50,000 and the coveted title of Kingsford BBQ Pitmasters All-Star Grand Champion are on the line. The last spot in the All-Star finale is up for grabs, and three of biggest names in the business are ready for battle.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Hog Wild
programme.desc: Judges Myron Mixon, Tuffy Stone and Big Moe Cason are pulling out all the stops for this one – rolling out whole hogs and a host of other surprises to test the two finalists. Who will take home the biggest bragging rights in BBQ?

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Smokin' in Mesquite
programme.desc: As temperatures soar, it's not just the meat that's getting cooked when teams head to the desert for the Smokin' in Mesquite BBQ Championship for a taste of the $40,000 in cash and prizes.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Decatur Jaycees Riverfest
programme.desc: Cooking skills, nerves and patience are tested at the historic Riverfest Barbecue Cookoff in Decatur, AL as the Pitmasters battle for the $3,000 top prize.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Murphysboro Barbecue Cook-off
programme.desc: The pressure's on as teams compete in one of the most difficult cook-offs of the year - the Murphysboro Barbecue Cook-off. Lee Ann and Myron face off in the whole hog competition while tempers flare between Johnny and one of the local cooks.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: American Royal Invitational Barbecue
programme.desc: Stakes are high when the best cook teams in the country are invited to the American Royal Invitational in Kansas City, Missouri. Myron faces his biggest rival on the circuit, restaurateur Chris Lilly. When Rookie Paul begs for help from pro Johnny Trigg.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: American Royal Open Barbecue
programme.desc: The competition heats up in the northeast, even as temperatures fall at the Diamond State BBQ Championship in Dover, DE. Harry's former teammate, Gary, competes on his own and Tuffy does Myron a favor, which could end up hurting his own chances.

programme.title: A Haunting: Echoes from the Grave
programme.desc: Ron and Nancy learn their house is a way station between life and death.

programme.title: A Haunting: Darkness Follows
programme.desc: A girl commits suicide and her spirit haunts the new tenants.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode includes: Red Shoes & UD, Insecurity Guard, She Finds Fugitives, Bad Friday & UD and SB: Rachel Cooke.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode includes: Two Mary Murders, Lenny Dirickson, Fatal Flowers & UD and Boston Healer.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode includes: Twisted Sisters & UD, Mad Maggio & UD, ATM Mystery & UD and Five Separated Siblings & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode includes: Carson Prince & UD, Fake Dr. Fraud & UD, Hero Molester & UD and Missing Theatre Student & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: Campus Calamity, Borden House, Kerouac Fan and Kentucky Bomber & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode includes: Jesse James Hollywood & UD, Rider Down & UD, Bad Dad and Picture Kristen Gone.

programme.title: Morden i Midsomer: Avsnitt 706
programme.desc: En traditionell festival i Midsomer går fel när en man bränns till döds inuti en halmdocka. Ett grishuvud hittas på altaret i byns kyrka, och den döde adjunktens homosexuelle älskare, börjar brinna helt utan förklaring.

programme.title: Morden i Midsomer: Avsnitt 707
programme.desc: Det är jul i Midsomer, och exakt nio år efter Ferdy Villiers självmord anländer hans familj och deras gäster till deras något förfallna hem för att fira.

programme.title: Morden i Midsomer: Avsnitt 801
programme.desc: Den lokala begravningsdirektören, Patrick Pennyman, upptäcks död av sin fru inne på begravningsbyrån. Hans handleder har skurits av, men vid utredning utesluts dock självmord...

programme.title: Morden i Midsomer: Avsnitt 802
programme.desc: Byborna i Midsomer njuter av solen vid Midsomer Regatta. Lugnet krossas dock när Veteran-loppet måste avbryts då en kropp hittats i vattnet.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Avsnitt 207
programme.desc: Mark Mylow planerar att spendera sin svensexa i skogen tillsammans med Al Large, men blir biten av en huggorm. Doktorn har ingen aning om vad de är och hans enda hopp ligger hos skogsvaktaren Stewart.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Avsnitt 208
programme.desc: En medlem ur frälsningsarmén kommer till Portwenn för att försöka hitta en försvunnen kvinna. Danny ber sin motvilliga flickvän Louisa att flytta in med honom.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Avsnitt 301
programme.desc: Martin misstänker att Louisa drabbats av minnesförlust. Joan tvingas behandlas av Martin efter att nästan ha kört på någon.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Avsnitt 302
programme.desc: Bert Large lämnar sin rörmokarfirma för att driva en restaurang. Efter att restaurangen öppnat inträffar flera fall av matförgiftning där Louisa är en av de drabbade.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Avsnitt 303
programme.desc: Ett par och deras son flyttar in bredvid Louisa och orsakar problem för henne, Martin och lokalbefolkningen. Invånarna börjar dessutom upptäcka något ovanligt med PC Penhale.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Avsnitt 304
programme.desc: Fru Wilson, den hypokondriska ägaren av Wilson-hotellet, ger all sin uppmärksamhet till en oberörd Martin, vilket leder till att Louisa blir avundsjuk.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Avsnitt 305
programme.desc: Paulines spelberoende kommer äntligen upp till ytan efter en hetlevrad konfrontation vid mottagningen.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Avsnitt 306
programme.desc: En mystisk andningsinfektion bryter ut i byn.

programme.title: On the Case: Mystery, Heartbreak and Justice
programme.desc: A look at three cases in which the quest for justice rages on after the verdict has been delivered.

programme.title: On the Case: A Betrayal Concealed
programme.desc: A 17-year-old's shocking murder shatters the peace in a small town and destroys her family.

programme.title: On the Case: A Hidden Clue
programme.desc: A hidden clue may hold the key to solving the vicious murder of a young woman.

programme.title: On the Case: A Face with No Name
programme.desc: Police have DNA evidence and a videotape of their suspect, yet they still struggle to find a vicious killer.

programme.title: On the Case: A Stranger Among Us
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Velda Rumfelt's disappearance in Brentwood, Missouri, in 1977 marked the beginning of a tragic, decades long mystery.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder in Store
programme.desc: In San Antonio, Texas, video game store manager Amber Belken is murdered in an apparent robbery gone wrong. On further investigation, however, detectives are troubled by the evidence.

programme.title: On the Case: Haunting Memories
programme.desc: Twenty-year-old college student Kim Montelaro goes missing from a mall parking lot, then her lifeless body is found in a ravine five miles from the mall; investigators piece together the timeline of Montelaro's last moments alive and crack the case.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Deception
programme.desc: Officers investigate the death of a father of four who was gunned down, however nothing about the crime is what it appears to be.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Under Pressure
programme.desc: The curse of -40 hits Buffalo pilots Devan and Scott on a food mail flight up the Mackenzie Valley when a mysterious rise in oil pressure threatens to destroy one of the C-46's engines.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The Right Stuff
programme.desc: Mikey goes on a treasure hunt to Venezuela for a rare CL-215 waterbomber. Cargo Manager Kelly's stress levels hit a new high when she returns from her Mexican vacation in even worse health than when she left.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The River Lift
programme.desc: A vital ferry link is down, so Buffalo mounts an all-out campaign to airlift 100,000lbs of essential goods across the Mackenzie River.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Don't Muck with Chuck
programme.desc: Crusty mechanic Chuck leads the scramble to ready the Electra for a disaster relief mission in Haiti, but fate's curveball sends them to the High Arctic instead.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The Finish Line
programme.desc: A multi-stop mission to the Far North has Devan, Scott and Adam facing a series of white- knuckle obstacles.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ski Plane
programme.desc: Young pilots AJ and Andrew get the chance of a lifetime to fly the magnificent DC-3 specially equipped with skis to land on frozen strips.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Buffalo Scores
programme.desc: Buffalo scores the charter of a lifetime when they're asked to transport the Stanley Cup on a tour of the North. Cup fever spreads quickly around Buffalo, and for Mikey, what begins as an innocent love for this hockey icon soon becomes an obsession.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Special Delivery
programme.desc: Chief Pilot Arnie lands the DC-3 on a homemade sand strip at a remote lodge. Electra expert Chuck goes one-on-one with a stubborn power unit, and Rod's wife Sasha goes into labour with the newest member of the McBryan family.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chi-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Metal Victorian-era burial casket; 1870s glass fire extinguisher grenades; a mechanical 1896 handcrafted Chicago fire station alarm box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Beantown Bidders
programme.desc: 1800s blackpowder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Everything's Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Knuckle Dust
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.
